titleStmt.title: SII 6.900: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 900. (A.R. No. 291-C of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śākava¨rṣē ruturasadinakṛtsaṁmitē sōmavārē pauṣyāṁ sat pu
ṣpamālāṁ hariśikharipatēḥ śrīnṛsiṁhasya nityaṁ . śrīmān vikhyātabhī
makṣitipatitanayō jīyyanaḥ pōtarājō bhāradvājānvayōdāt
sutadhanayaśasāṁ vṛddhayē bhaktiyuktaḥ . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1266
gunēṁṭi puṣya punnamiyu sōmavāramunāṁḍu bhāradvājagōtrajuṁ
ḍaina pōtarājajīyana tanaku Abhīṣṭasiddhigānu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki nitya
munnu tirumāla sama¨rppaṇacēyanu bhaṁḍārana gaṁḍamāḍalu tommidi te
likaṭu veṭṭi reṁḍu nibaṁdhalu prasādamunu vilpi ciṁgusēnāpatikiṁ beṭṭenu vīru Ī prasādamu
bhujiṁcci Ī ciṁgusēnāpati tana beṭṭina puṣpavāṭikanu puvulanu nityamunnu ti
rumālapeṭi jītabhuktisahitamugā prasādamu bhujiṁpaṁgalāṁḍu Ī dha¨rmmu
vu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigāṁ jellaṁgaladu . Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī
śrī
pātrapōtarājīyyanaṁgāri mahādēvi lakumādēvi śrīnārasiṁhyanātuniki Avama
jiyalu Iddarakuṁgā biḷasarālu mūṁ(ṁ)ḍu sama¨rppiṁcenu Ī pātrapōta
jīyanaṁgāreppabayyamadēviṁgāru tama Ācā¨ryyapparu cenavalabharuṁbha
dramayaṁgārikinni [Appa]yaṁgārikinni punyābhivṛddhigānu gaṁḍamāḍa Īruvayi
peṭi talluṁḍu prasādamu tōṭavaṭṭi Ācāṁdrā¨rkkasthaĪga cellaṁgaladu śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.900 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
